CustomField.formula:
OR( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Full_Name__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(countryName__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Email__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(ratePerHour__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(LinkedIn__c)), Member_Skill_Count__c > 2 ), INCLUDES( CognitoGroups__c , 'RDImportClaimed'), INCLUDES( CognitoGroups__c , 'RDIndiaImportClaimed'), INCLUDES( CognitoGroups__c , 'RDImport'), INCLUDES( CognitoGroups__c , 'RDIndiaImport'),
AND( INCLUDES( CognitoGroups__c , 'BullhornIntegration'), NOT(isBlank(resumeLocation__c)) ) )
CustomField.label: Match Ready?
